title: LinTimes 18 In Pre-lit Christmas Wreath for Front Door, 45cm Blue Xmas Wreaths with 15 LED Lights, Christmas Baubles Six-Pointed Star Decorative Garland for Fireplace Wall Door Xmas Outside Decor
features: Dazzling Blue Christmas Wreaths: Make a statement with this stunning blue Christmas wreath. Its gentle color adds a unique and eye-catching touch to your holiday decorations, instantly elevating the festive atmosphere.

Durable & Reusable Xmas Wreath: Crafted with care using premium materials such as PVC, plastic and cloth, this wreath is reusable and durable. This 18 inch blue Xmas wreath is the perfect size for your front door. It serves as a festive and welcoming decoration to greet your guests during the holiday season.

Exquisite Xmas Baubles & Six-Pointed Star Decor: Adorned with an array of blue Christmas balls and beautifully crafted six-pointed stars, this wreath exudes elegance and sophistication. It becomes a focal point of admiration and adds a touch of luxury to your decor.

Battery Operated Wreaths for Front Door: Equipped with 15 warm white LED lights, this wreath effortlessly creates a warm and inviting atmosphere, illuminating your home with a gentle glow to evoke the joyful spirit of the holiday season.

Versatility Christmas Decoration: The 18 inch Xmas wreath is perfect for adorning your front door, walls, fireplace or any other desired space. For outdoor display, it is recommended to hang it on a covered porch to protect it from direct sunlight and adverse weather conditions, ensuring its longevity.
description: Product Description LinTimes Christmas Wreaths for Front Door- Indoor & Outdoor Christmas Decoration Enhance your home's festive charm with our beautiful Christmas wreaths. Handmade holiday wreath in bright colors, a classic Christmas decoration for your front door, fireplace and wall, bringing warmth and joy to your home. LInTimes provides 2 sizes - 16-inch Christmas wreath & 18-inch Christmas wreath, with various colors and sizes to meet all your decoration needs. 16 Inch Silver Christmas Wreaths-Without Light The vine base of the silver wreath provides a natural and rustic look, while the silver Christmas baubles, flowers, holly berries, and frost pine cones add a touch of elegance and sparkle. The silver color scheme gives the wreath a modern and sophisticated feel. The lush green foliage of this wreath creates a natural and inviting appearance, evoking the beauty of a winter forest. It brings a touch of nature into your home, adding a sense of tranquility and freshness to your holiday décor. 16 Inch Gold Christmas Wreaths-Without Light Our Christmas wreaths are decorated with various Xmas baubles, berries and pinecones that perfectly capture the spirit of the holiday. These carefully selected Christmas decorations create a stunning visual effect and add a strong Christmas atmosphere to the entire wreath. This 16-inch gold Christmas wreath is the perfect size to bring a touch of elegance and sophistication to your holiday decor, without overwhelming your space. The gold baubles, flowers, holly berries, and pine cones on this wreath create a radiant display that catches the light and captivates the eye, elevating the festive ambiance of any room. The timeless gold color scheme of this wreath ensures that it will never go out of style, making it a valued addition to your Christmas decorations that can be cherished for years to come. 18 Inch Red Christmas Wreaths-With 15 LED Lights The vibrant red baubles, red berries and pine cones are carefully selected to create a harmonious and visually striking arrangement that will continue to captivate and delight throughout the entire holiday season. Hang this red wreath on your front door to create a warm and inviting atmosphere, signaling to friends, family, and guests that your home is filled with the joy and warmth of the holiday season. Featuring 15 LED lights, this wreath illuminates your entryway with a soft and inviting glow. The lights are battery-operated, allowing you the freedom to hang it anywhere without worrying about unsightly cords. Create a magical ambiance and extend the joyful spirit of Christmas to all who pass by. 18 Inch Blue Christmas Wreaths-With 15 LED Lights This pre lit Christmas wreath boasts a vibrant blue color and measures 45cm in diameter, making it the perfect statement piece for welcoming guests into your home. Enhancing its allure are 15 enchanting LED lights that delicately illuminate the wreath, creating a warm and inviting ambiance. Crafted with durability in mind, this wreath is perfect for outdoor use. Hang it on your front door, porch, or outside wall, and let its beauty shine throughout the holiday season. Its sturdy construction ensures that it will withstand the elements, delivering lasting joy year after year. 16 Inch Silver Christmas Wreaths 16 Inch Gold Christmas Wreaths 18 Inch Red Christmas Wreaths 18 Inch Blue Christmas Wreaths Christmas Wreath Embrace the spirit of Christmas and transform your home into a winter wonderland with our stunning Christmas Wreath for Front Door. Let it be a beacon of joy and happiness for all who enter your home this holiday season. Winter Christmas Wreath Cheer To Your Door, Fireplace & Wall. Whether you're hosting a festive gathering or simply welcoming loved ones into your home, this Christmas wreath sets a warm and inviting tone. Its classic design and timeless appeal make it a versatile choice that complements a variety of home styles and décors. The Christmas wreath is the perfect size for hanging on your front door, above your fireplace or anywhere else you want to add a festive touch to your home decor. The baubles, berries and pine cones are all made with durable materials that won't easily fade or break. Simply give it a light dusting or spray with water to maintain its beauty throughout the holiday season. 16" Red Xmas Wreath 16" Gold Xmas Wreath 16" Silver Xmas Wreath 18" Red Xmas Wreath 18" Blue Xmas Wreath Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 95 4.4 out of 5 stars 95 4.4 out of 5 stars 95 4.4 out of 5 stars 95 4.4 out of 5 stars 95 Price — no data £15.99 £ 15 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £20.99 £ 20 . 99 £13.59 £ 13 . 59 Size/Color 16 Inch/Red 16 Inch/Gold 16 Inch/Silver 18 Inch/Red 18 Inch/Blue
